message:
feat(python): numpy.fix wrapper parity (franken_numpy-0fgk)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.fix(x) — element-wise
truncate-toward-zero rounding (ceil for negatives, floor for
positives). Test covers positive non-integer (3.7→3), negative
non-integer (-3.7→-3), exact integers unchanged, mixed-sign 1-D,
integer input pass-through, NaN propagation, and 2-D array.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
